parameters.name: read_emails
parameters.description: Read emails from inbox. Parameters: folder (default INBOX), limit (default 10), since (date like 2026-03-01, emails ON or AFTER this date), before (date like 2026-03-02, emails BEFORE this date, use since+before together for a specific day), unseen (true=only unread), from (filter by sender email)

value.since: ={{ $fromAI('since', 'Only fetch emails on or after this date (ISO date, optional)', 'string') }}
value.before: ={{ $fromAI('before', 'Only fetch emails before this date (ISO date, optional, use with since for date range)', 'string') }}
value.unseen: ={{ $fromAI('unseen', 'Set to true to only return unread emails (optional)', 'string') }}

schema.description: Max number of emails to return (default: 10)
Only fetch emails on or after this date (ISO date, optional)
Only fetch emails before this date (ISO date, optional)
Set to true to only return unread emails (optional)

parameters.name: send_email
parameters.description: Send an email. Parameters: to (recipient email, required), subject (email subject, required), body (plain text body, required), html (HTML body, optional)
